log.context:
The fix works perfectly. The endpoint now returns only real Claude subagents (17-char hex IDs) with proper names, token counts, and statuses. All the hook files and shell script outputs are filtered out.

---

**Root cause:** The `/api/subagents` endpoint was including all `.output` files in the tasks directory — including `hook_XXXXXX.output` files (plain-text stderr from git hook scripts that fire on subagent start/stop) and short alphanumeric files from background shell scripts.
